hero.title: Your deal was ready...
hero.subtitle: Artificial intelligence powers every move. Visualize complex relationships. Execute agreements securely. Close more deals and never miss an opportunity.
hero.proof: 10,000+ deals closed • Powered by AI • Trusted by 50+ companies

problem.title: Do you face this every day?
problem.subtitle: Executives and managers deal with complex relationships. Without the right tools, opportunities disappear.

items.title: Complex Relationships
items.description: Multiple parties, indirect connections, hidden relationship paths. You miss opportunities because you cannot see the full network.

items.title: Repetitive Tasks
items.description: Emails, documents, follow-ups, all done manually. They consume 10+ hours a week that should be spent negotiating.

items.title: Risky Agreements
items.description: No milestone tracking, no payment guarantee, no visibility into who accepted what. Real financial risk.

solution.title: How We Improve Your Results
solution.subtitle: Artificial Intelligence in every pillar: visibility, automation, and security

pillars.title: 🧠 Intelligence (Powered by GPT-4 Vision)
pillars.description: AI visualizes your relationship network, enriches profiles automatically, and detects risk in seconds. See your whole network. Discover paths. Identify opportunities.
benefits: Smart graph: AI maps and suggests strategic connections
Automatic enrichment with AI: LinkedIn and public data processed
AI-powered KYC: verifies risk, fraud, and compliance automatically
Business card to contact in seconds with vision OCR

pillars.title: ⚡ Automation (Powered by GPT + Whisper + TTS)
pillars.description: AI transcribes, drafts, summarizes, and negotiates. Save 10+ hours per week. You speak, AI executes.
benefits: Voice notes with AI: speech to summary plus structured tasks
AI drafts: personalized emails in seconds
Smart reminders: AI decides the best follow-up time
AI assistant chat that executes actions

pillars.title: 🛡️ Security (AI-Enhanced Trust)
pillars.description: AI validates agreements, detects risky patterns, and suggests middle-ground terms. Close with confidence.
benefits: AI-validated agreements with automatic legal term analysis
AI negotiation suggests middle terms based on history
AI-monitored escrow detects anomalous risk patterns
Full tracking of who accepted what, when, and why

steps.title: Speak
steps.description: Record a voice note during the meeting. The system listens in Portuguese.

steps.title: AI Processes
steps.description: Whisper transcribes • GPT-4 summarizes • Tasks are extracted • Agreements are analyzed

steps.title: You Receive
steps.description: Executive summary • Structured tasks • Smart reminders • Clear next steps

steps.title: System Acts
steps.description: Contacts created • Documents drafted • Emails sent • Agreements tracked

aiFeatures.title: AI Technology That Makes the Difference
aiFeatures.subtitle: Not just AI. AI specialized for your workflow.
aiFeatures.advancedDescription: Every feature uses artificial intelligence to save your time and increase your productivity.
aiFeatures.advancedStack: GPT-4 Vision • Whisper • Function Calling • Custom Workflows • Real-time Processing

features.name: Smart Assistant Chat
features.description: Natural conversation in Portuguese. Executes actions such as creating contacts, updating records, and generating documents.

features.name: Speech-to-Text with Whisper
features.description: Transcribes meeting audio in Portuguese. Automatically detects language. Up to 25MB per file.

features.name: Analysis with GPT-4 Vision
features.description: Photograph a business card and extract name, email, phone, company, and job title with no manual typing.

features.name: Smart Summarization
features.description: Turns raw transcription into an executive summary, tasks with deadlines, and useful context.

features.name: AI Agreement Generation
features.description: Negotiation proposals become middle-ground AI suggestions and automatic draft agreements.

features.name: Text-to-Speech
features.description: Audio responses for busy executives, with natural-sounding voices.

proof.title: Who Trusts Us
proof.subtitle: Executives and teams closing more deals, faster

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcomeDescription: Manage your contacts, notes and credits efficiently
dashboard.contactsDescription: Manage all your professional contacts in one place
dashboard.creditsDescription: View your balance and transaction history
dashboard.uploadMediaDescription: Upload business cards and other files
dashboard.agentSettingsDescription: Configure the AI agent's context prompt

agentConfiguration.title: Agent Configuration
agentConfiguration.description: Edit the prompts that are sent to the AI to process business cards and audio transcriptions.
agentConfiguration.ocrPromptHint: This prompt defines how the AI should analyze the business card image and extract information (name, email, phone, company, job title).
agentConfiguration.transcriptionPromptHint: This prompt defines how the AI should analyze and process audio note transcriptions. The raw transcription will be automatically appended at the end.
agentConfiguration.workflowPromptHint: This prompt guides the AI when executing automation workflows (drafts, templates, reminders, etc.). The workflow context is appended automatically.
